_note: TEMPLATE STUB (ARCHITECTURE §5). One config per group. Fill after draft. Owner count varies per group — set the roster at draft; do not assume a fixed size.
_count_conference_championship_note: League rule (ARCHITECTURE §1/§5): do conference-championship wins settle into a team's season win total? Sportsbooks differ, so it is per-group config, not a code constant. CFBD returns conf-title games as seasonType=regular; the shared cache tags them but excludes nothing — this flag decides. Default false.
